Getting Started Guide.txt.title: Getting Started Guide
Getting Started Guide.txt.content:
Welcome to Anamika! Here's how to get started:

1. SIGN UP
- Visit our website and click 'Sign Up'
- Enter your email and create a password
- Verify your email address within 2 hours

2. CREATE YOUR FIRST PROJECT
- Click 'New Project' in your dashboard
- Give it a name and description
- Select your industry type
- Click 'Create'

3. ADD YOUR TEAM MEMBERS
- Go to Settings > Team
- Click 'Invite Member'
- Enter their email address
- Select their role (Admin, Manager, Member)
- They'll receive an invitation email

4. CONNECT YOUR KNOWLEDGE BASE
- Upload your support documents
- Go to Admin > Knowledge Base
- Click 'Upload File' and select your documents
- Files will be indexed automatically

5. START CHATTING
- Click the chat widget in the bottom right
- Ask your support questions
- Our AI will search your knowledge base for answers

Need help? Contact support@anamika.ai

Pricing & Plans.txt.title: Pricing & Plans
Pricing & Plans.txt.content:
ANAMIKA PRICING PLANS

FREE PLAN - $0/month
- Up to 100 messages per month
- 1 knowledge base
- 2 team members
- Community support
- Basic analytics

PRO PLAN - $99/month
- Unlimited messages
- Up to 5 knowledge bases
- 10 team members
- Priority email support
- Advanced analytics
- Custom branding
- API access

ENTERPRISE PLAN - Custom pricing
- Unlimited everything
- Dedicated account manager
- 24/7 phone support
- Custom integrations
- SLA guarantee
- On-premise deployment option
- Advanced security features

FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS:

Q: Can I upgrade or downgrade anytime?
A: Yes! Changes take effect at the end of your billing cycle. No cancellation fees.

Q: What payment methods do you accept?
A: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal, and bank transfers for enterprise.

Q: Is there a free trial?
A: Yes, all plans have a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

Q: What happens if I go over my message limit?
A: We'll notify you before you exceed your limit. You can upgrade anytime.

API Documentation.txt.title: API Documentation
API Documentation.txt.content:
ANAMIKA API REFERENCE

Base URL: https://api.anamika.ai/v1

AUTHENTICATION:
All requests require an API key in the Authorization header:
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY

EOAMPLE ENDPOINTS:

1. SEND MESSAGE
POST /chat/message
Request Body:
{
  "conversation_id": "conv_123",
  "message": "How do I reset my password?",
  "user_id": "user_456"
}

Response:
{
  "status": "success",
  "message_id": "msg_789",
  "reply": "To reset your password...",
  "source": "knowledge_base"
}

2. GET CONVERSATIONS
GET /conversations?user_id=user_456&limit=10

Response:
{
  "status": "success",
  "conversations": [
    {
      "id": "conv_123",
      "subject": "Password Reset",
      "created_at": "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z",
      "messages_count": 5,
      "status": "resolved"
    }
  ]
}

3. UPLOAD KNOWLEDGE BASE FILE
POST /knowledge-base/upload
Headers: Content-Type: multipart/form-data
Form Data:
- file: (binary file)
- name: "My Document"

Response:
{
  "status": "success",
  "file_id": "file_xyz",
  "name": "My Document",
  "size": 2500000,
  "indexed": true
}

RATE LIMITS:
- Free Plan: 100 requests per minute
- Pro Plan: 1000 requests per minute
- Enterprise: Unlimited (with SLA)

ERROR CODES:
- 400: Bad Request
- 401: Unauthorized (invalid API key)
- 403: Forbidden
- 429: Rate limit exceeded
- 500: Server error

For more details, visit: https://docs.anamika.ai/api

Troubleshooting Common Issues.txt.title: Troubleshooting Common Issues
Troubleshooting Common Issues.txt.content:
COMMON ISSUES & SOLUTIONS

1. CHAT WIDGET NOT LOADING
Problem: The chat widget doesn't appear on my website
Solution:
- Check that JavaScript is enabled in your browser
- Clear your browser cache and reload the page
- Make sure the widget script is correctly installed
- Check browser console for errors (F12 > Console)
- Verify your API key is correct in the code

2. CHAT NOT RESPONDING
Problem: I send a message but the bot doesn't reply
Solution:
- Check your internet connection
- Verify your knowledge base has files uploaded
- Make sure your API key is active (check Admin > Settings)
- If using custom endpoints, verify they're accessible
- Check rate limits haven't been exceeded

3. FILE UPLOAD FAILS
Problem: Can't upload files to knowledge base
Solution:
- Check file format (PDF, DOC, DOCX, TXT, CSV supported)
- Ensure file size is under 25 MB
- Verify you're not at the 5-file limit
- Try uploading a smaller file first
- Check your account has Admin permissions

4. SLOW RESPONSE TIMES
Problem: Responses are taking a long time
Solution:
- Reduce knowledge base size (archive old files)
- Check your server's internet connection
- Upgrade to a higher plan for better performance
- Clear browser cache
- Try in a different browser

5. TEAM MEMBERS CAN'T ACCESS
Problem: Invited team members don't have access
Solution:
- Make sure their email address is correct
- Check their email inbox (including spam folder)
- Resend the invitation from Admin > Team
- Verify they accepted the invitation
- Check their account role permissions

STILL HAVING ISSUES?
Contact us:
- Email: support@anamika.ai
- Phone: 1-800-ANAMIKA (1-800-262-6452)
- Chat: Visit our support portal
- Docs: https://docs.anamika.ai
